# Duckaroo — Fish Tank Cleaning & Aquarium Maintenance Service

> Duckaroo is Brisbane and Gold Coast's professional fish tank cleaning and aquarium maintenance service, based at [aquaticswandesign.com.au](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au). We serve residential and commercial clients across Brisbane, Gold Coast, Logan, and Ipswich, Queensland, Australia. Rated 4.9/5 from 247 reviews, open Monday–Sunday 8:00am–6:00pm AEST. Phone +61 4 5766 3939, email aquaticswandesign@gmail.com.

## Services

- [Fish tank cleaning & aquarium maintenance](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/service): Aquarium maintenance, pond cleaning, tank setup, and tank removal. Same-day service available for urgent aquarium issues. Residential and commercial, including water quality testing and treatment.

## Products

- [Online plant & aquarium store](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/products): Rare aquatic plants including Bucephalandra, Anubias, Amazon Frogbit, and Rotala, plus equipment and accessories. Australia-wide shipping with a live arrival guarantee.

## Educational Content

- [Aquarium care blog](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/blogs): Expert guides on aquarium care, fish health, aquascaping, and plant care.
- [How to set up your first aquarium](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/how-to-setup-your-first-aquarium): Complete beginner's guide to aquarium setup.
- [Common aquarium diseases](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/common-aquarium-diseases): Identification and treatment guide for 30 common freshwater and marine aquarium diseases, including symptoms, Australian medications, and expert advice.

## About

- [About Duckaroo](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/about-us): 15+ years experience in aquarium and pond care.
- [Contact & free quote](https://aquaticswandesign.com.au/contact): Book a service or get a free quote.

## Key Facts

- Serves all Brisbane suburbs (CBD, Southside, Northside, Bayside, Eastern and Western suburbs) and all Gold Coast regions.
- Australia-wide shipping for live aquatic plants, including rare Bucephalandra varieties.
- Professional technicians specialising in fish tank cleaning and ongoing aquarium maintenance.
